title: docs: update getting-started.adoc for 1.0.0 release
body:
This PR updates the getting-started.adoc file to reflect the Spring AI 1.0.0 release

- Updated BOM version from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.0.0
- Adjusted the repository section to clarify Maven Central usage

No other files were changed.
author: nahyukk
